item.title: It'd be nice to have rotten, shitty maleness called out as rotten and shitty more often.
item.description: MV Edit: Wow, this really resonates with a lot of people. Take this lesson to heart. Don't be that type of guy and/or don't accept that sort of behavior from others. The world is not obligated to give you whatever you want just because you want it.
item.dc:creator: Shaodyn

item.title: How to find hidden cameras in rentals and hotels
item.description:
(sound)
source: https://www.tiktok.com/@malwaretech malwaretech's website: https://www.malwaretech.com/ note: besides serious privacy risks like mentioned above, airbnb and others like it must be banned cuz they destroy affordable housing for locals: https://www.theinvisibletourist.com/why-you-shouldnt-use-airbnb-issues-you-didnt-know/
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: This counts as art, right? My R2-D2.
item.description:
Took me four years to build it. Full size model.
I fabricated a lot of the parts myself with pretty rudimentary tools.
The feet are all steel. I did not weld these, got them secondhand from another builder.
I had to learn a lot. I knew nothing about servos or RC stuff.
I designed the legs attachments to come apart so I can transport him in pieces. He weighs about 150 pounds.
Before and after weathering. A clean droid just doesn’t look right to me.
When the weather is nice my ten year old son drives him around on the sidewalk and all the neighborhood kids run outside. The plan was to do hospital visits but then the pandemic hit so that’s on hold.
item.dc:creator: LeastViral

item.title: Game Room 2022
item.description:
Recently designed and built a custom entertainment center to house my console collection.
The center unit houses HDMI consoles and arcade sticks, the array of switches that manage the various inputs and outputs, along with room for expansion down the line. I designed this unit large enough for the 77” LG CX OLED that i so desperately want but will not buy until the price drops by 2/3 lol
This unit was built for my 36” JVC D Series CRT (for all my 240p/480i sources) as well as space 3rd/4th/5th gen consoles. (Dreamcast hanging out here for now as well)
This is an identical unit for my 34” Sony XBR970, I use this for 480p/720p sources. This unit is intended for 5th and 6th gen consoles but also currently houses some duplicate consoles to fill out the space. The final layout of both units has been decided, but is pending acquiring some additional consoles eventually. Neo Geo, CD-I, and Atari Jaguar are next on the list. In that order.
A small section for my Atari 2600 and small collection of games, as well as a bin for some lightguns and additional peripherals. I have a concept in mind for 2nd gen and prior consoles but it will have to remain in my brain for now! Worth mentioning that this CRT is the exact TV I played NES on as a kid at my grandparents house. Salvaged it from there when my grandpa died. Lots of good memories.
Nintendo, Sega, PC Engine, and 3DO games.
PlayStation and Xbox games, some books, some VHS.
The controller drawers (closed drawer is my messy handheld/remote drawer.)
The finish turned out nice and I love how great the units look next to each other even without the center unit being lit. The center unit lighting was a conscious choice, I do not want lights under the TV where we watch movies and TV, and there was not enough room in the design to diffuse light while keeping the TV low to the ground/at eye level.
item.dc:creator: jacoblawter

item.title: Down in the dumps dump
item.description:
I have to find a new psychiatrist since I moved. The struggle is real
Stupid brain, who asked you anyways
Oh no you caught me I wasn't joking
Hell yeah.
When I play any online game
Look at that toad, all there for you
It's weird living in the darkest timeline.
Me trying to meet new people
I'm going to go lay in n the woods like the possum that I am
Me trying to do even the simplest things.
"Oh God stop saying weird shit" -my brain to itself
They're all good dogs bront
That cardinal dropping the hottest album of 2022
The mission was based on it's secrecy. A buncha dudes flying into Mordor on huge birbs is not sbeaky
Need that happy chemical
When I'm visiting my parents with the pup she isn't allowed on their couch so she tries to sneak up there. The problem is she's 73 pounds
Looking good and feeling good
I still do this playing through games. The story doesn't matter, I need to shiny hunt.
Let's gooooooo
Yes you.
Do I though?
This used to be me in college but now I'm old and get tired after a few beers and any more then four and I'll be hungover for three days
Seriously, what's going on?
Good freaking idea Gimli.
Just moved to NC from PA and I sent this my friend after they got like a foot of snow
I need to break this habit. BUt I love my zoom juice
Oh... Oh no.
I might be a dumpster fire but at least I'm fun to watch
Got em
I'm in this picture and I don't like it
Seriously, mine bunches up and it's like moving a car sometimes. I swear by it though
I dunno how this got in here and I'm to lazy to change it lol
People are gushing about this new way to get high
They really don't. I spend way to much time shiny hunting.
Always a weird thing to bring up for me. BPD is a bitch
Oh yeahhhhh get it pumpkin
Good girl tax So here's some Mental health is in the pooper, sharing somethings that make me laugh in case some needs it
item.dc:creator: Psull10
